results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?caseName (AVG(xsd:float(?penalty)) AS ?averagePenalty) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement> WHERE {
  ?case <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/type/Case> .
  ?case <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/pred/case_name> ?caseName .
  ?case <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/pred/case_has_disposition> ?disposition .

  ?disposition <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/pred/disposition_penalty_usd> ?penalty .
  ?disposition <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/pred/disposition_cites_statute> ?statute .
  ?statute <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/type/CitationStatute> .
} GROUP BY ?caseName

results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?case_name (AVG(xsd:float(?penalty)) AS ?average_penalty) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement> WHERE {
  ?case <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/type/Case> .
  ?case <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/pred/case_name> ?case_name .
  ?case <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/pred/case_has_disposition> ?disposition .
  ?disposition <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/type/Disposition> .
  ?disposition <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/pred/disposition_cites_statute> ?statute .
  ?statute <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/type/CitationStatute> .
  ?disposition <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-fec-enforcement/pred/disposition_penalty_usd> ?penalty .
  FILTER(xsd:float(?penalty) > 0)
}
GROUP BY ?case_name
ORDER BY DESC(?average_penalty)
LIMIT 10

schema:
-- SQLite database schema

-- Table Case: 140 rows (from Case.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Case" (
  "case_id" TEXT,
  "case_no" INTEGER,
  "case_name" TEXT,
  "case_open_date" TEXT,
  "case_close_date" TEXT,
  "case_open_year" INTEGER,
  "case_mur_type" TEXT,
  "case_n_documents" INTEGER,
  "case_n_commission_votes" INTEGER,
  "case_n_respondents" INTEGER,
  "case_n_dispositions" INTEGER,
  "case_election_cycles" REAL,
  "case_url" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Case:
--   case_id='mur_8363', case_no='8363', case_name='Calspan Corporation', case_open_date='2023-08-16', case_close_date='2025-05-12', case_open_year='2023', case_mur_type='current', case_n_documents='19', case_n_commission_votes='2', case_n_respondents='2', case_n_dispositions='3', case_election_cycles='2022,2020,2024', case_url='/legal/matter-under-review/8363/'
--   case_id='mur_8353', case_no='8353', case_name='Black Voters Matter Action PAC', case_open_date='2024-06-27', case_close_date='2025-03-17', case_open_year='2024', case_mur_type='current', case_n_documents='10', case_n_commission_votes='3', case_n_respondents='2', case_n_dispositions='2', case_election_cycles='2022', case_url='/legal/matter-under-review/8353/'

-- Table Respondent: 418 rows (from Respondent.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Respondent" (
  "respondent_id" TEXT,
  "respondent_name" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Respondent:
--   respondent_id='resp_8d0e1f7625eb', respondent_name='Meier, David'
--   respondent_id='resp_0b1858959954', respondent_name='Sauer, Peter'

-- Table Subject: 16 rows (from Subject.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Subject" (
  "subject_id" TEXT,
  "subject_label" TEXT,
  "subject_primary_id" INTEGER,
  "subject_secondary_id" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from Subject:
--   subject_id='subj_0bc4e6923132', subject_label='Contributions-Prohibited', subject_primary_id='3', subject_secondary_id='15'
--   subject_id='subj_190bf6908f4f', subject_label='Contributions-In the name of another', subject_primary_id='3', subject_secondary_id='11'

-- Table Disposition: 504 rows (from Disposition.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Disposition" (
  "disposition_id" TEXT,
  "disposition_case_id" TEXT,
  "disposition_respondent_id" TEXT,
  "disposition_respondent_name" TEXT,
  "disposition_outcome" TEXT,
  "disposition_category_id" INTEGER,
  "disposition_penalty_usd" REAL
);
-- sample rows from Disposition:
--   disposition_id='mur_8363_disp_0', disposition_case_id='mur_8363', disposition_respondent_id='resp_95568d960eee', disposition_respondent_name='Calspan Corporation', disposition_outcome='Conciliation: Pre Probable Cause', disposition_category_id='1', disposition_penalty_usd='25000.0'
--   disposition_id='mur_8363_disp_1', disposition_case_id='mur_8363', disposition_respondent_id='resp_0b1858959954', disposition_respondent_name='Sauer, Peter', disposition_outcome='Conciliation: Pre Probable Cause', disposition_category_id='1', disposition_penalty_usd='25000.0'

-- Table CitationStatute: 235 rows (from CitationStatute.csv)
CREATE TABLE "CitationStatute" (
  "citation_id" TEXT,
  "citation_text" TEXT,
  "citation_title" INTEGER,
  "citation_type" TEXT,
  "citation_url" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from CitationStatute:
--   citation_id='cite_ce583a7e887f', citation_text='30118(a)', citation_title='52', citation_type='statute', citation_url='https://www.govinfo.gov/link/uscode/52/3'
--   citation_id='cite_2506a24bf34c', citation_text='30119(a)', citation_title='52', citation_type='statute', citation_url='https://www.govinfo.gov/link/uscode/52/3'

-- Table Participant: 738 rows (from Participant.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Participant" (
  "participant_id" TEXT,
  "participant_case_id" TEXT,
  "participant_name" TEXT,
  "participant_role" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Participant:
--   participant_id='mur_8363_part_0', participant_case_id='mur_8363', participant_name='Calspan Corporation', participant_role='Complainant'
--   participant_id='mur_8363_part_1', participant_case_id='mur_8363', participant_name='Lippes Mathias LLP', participant_role="Respondent's Counsel"

-- Table Year: 4 rows (from Year.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Year" (
  "year_id" INTEGER,
  "year_value" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from Year:
--   year_id='2023', year_value='2023'
--   year_id='2024', year_value='2024'

-- Foreign key hints (join on these):
--   Case.case_id -> Respondent.respondent_id
--   Case.case_id -> Subject.subject_id
--   Case.case_id -> Year.case_open_year
--   Case.disposition_case_id -> Disposition.disposition_id
--   Case.participant_case_id -> Participant.participant_id
--   Disposition.disposition_id -> CitationStatute.citation_id
--   Disposition.disposition_id -> Respondent.disposition_respondent_id
--   Respondent.respondent_id -> Case.case_id
